content.json: >**NOTE:** This workbook depends on a parser based on a Kusto Function to work as expected [**Corelight**](https://aka.ms/sentinel-Corelight-parser) which is deployed with the Microsoft Sentinel Solution.

parameters.name: Sensor
parameters.label: Corelight Sensor
parameters.query:
corelight_conn
| distinct sensor_name
| sort by sensor_name

parameters.query:
let pre_services = datatable(service: string) [
    "dce_rpc",
    "dhcp",
    "dns",
    "ftp",
    "gssapi,smb,krb",
    "http",
    "krb_tcp",
    "ntp",
    "smb",
    "smb,gssapi,ntlm",
    "smb,ntlm,gssapi",
    "smtp",
    "ssh",
    "ssl",
    "xmpp,ssl",
    "vxlan",
    "dce_rpc,gssapi,ntlm,smb",
    "dce_rpc,smb",
    "dnp3_tcp",
    "ftp-data",
    "gssapi",
    "gssapi,ntlm,smb",
    "gssapi,smb",
    "http,socks",
    "imap",
    "irc",
    "irc-dcc-data",
    "mqtt",
    "rdp",
    "smb,gssapi",
    "socks",
    "ssl,ftp",
    "ssl,socks",
    "ssl,xmpp",
    "xmpp",
    "ftp,ssl",
    "ntlm,gssapi,smb",
    "ntlm,gssapi,smb,dce_rpc",
    "smb,dce_rpc",
    "socks,http",
    "ssl,smtp",
    "bacnet",
    "ntlm,smb,gssapi",
    "smtp,ssl",
    "gssapi,smb,ntlm",
    "gssapi,dce_rpc,ntlm,smb",
    "smb,dce_rpc,gssapi,ntlm",
    "socks,ssl",
    "ntlm,dce_rpc,gssapi,smb",
    "ntlm,dce_rpc,smb,gssapi",
    "gssapi,ntlm,dce_rpc,smb",
    "smtp/ssl",
    "xmpp/ssl"
];

union
    (corelight_conn_agg
    | where '{ShowAggregation}' == "Yes"),
    (corelight_conn
    | where '{ShowAggregation}' == "No")
| where ('*' in ({Sensor}) or sensor_name in ({Sensor}))
| project app 
| where isnotempty(app)
| mv-expand service = app
| distinct tostring(service)
| sort by tostring(service) asc
| union pre_services

parameters.name: AdditionalFilter
parameters.label: Additional Filter
parameters.query: print '*'

parameters.name: connection_uid
parameters.label: Connection UID
parameters.query: print '*'

content.query:
union
    (corelight_conn_agg
    | where '{ShowAggregation}' == "Yes"),
    (corelight_conn
    | where '{ShowAggregation}' == "No")
| where ('*' in ({Sensor}) or sensor_name in ({Sensor})) 
       and (('*' == ('{id_orig_h}') or id_orig_h == ('{id_orig_h}')) )
       and (('*' == ('{id_orig_p}') or id_orig_p == ('{id_orig_p}')) )
       and (('*' == ('{id_resp_h}') or id_resp_h == ('{id_resp_h}')) )
       and (('*' == ('{id_resp_p}') or id_resp_p == ('{id_resp_p}')) )
    and (('*' == ('{connection_uid}') or uid contains ('{connection_uid}')) )
| search '{AdditionalFilter}'
| where ('*' == ('{service}') or set_has_element(app, '{service}'))
| extend total_bytes = bytes_in + bytes_out
| summarize volume = sum(total_bytes)
content.title: Traffic Volume

content.query:
union
    (corelight_conn_agg
    | where '{ShowAggregation}' == "Yes"),
    (corelight_conn
    | where '{ShowAggregation}' == "No")
| where ('*' in ({Sensor}) or sensor_name in ({Sensor})) 
       and (('*' == ('{id_orig_h}') or id_orig_h == ('{id_orig_h}')) )
       and (('*' == ('{id_orig_p}') or id_orig_p == ('{id_orig_p}')) )
       and (('*' == ('{id_resp_h}') or id_resp_h == ('{id_resp_h}')) )
       and (('*' == ('{id_resp_p}') or id_resp_p == ('{id_resp_p}')) )
       and (('*' == ('{connection_uid}') or uid contains ('{connection_uid}')) )
| where not(is_broadcast == "true" and local_resp == "true") 
       and direction == "outbound"
| search '{AdditionalFilter}'
| where ('*' == ('{service}') or set_has_element(app, '{service}'))
| summarize  Service = make_set(app), Bytes = sum(orig_ip_bytes) by id_orig_h, id_resp_h
| top 10 by Bytes
| extend ipinfo = geo_info_from_ip_address(id_resp_h)
| extend Country = tostring(ipinfo.country)
| extend Service = strcat_array(Service, ", ")
| project ["Source IP"] = id_orig_h, ["Destination IP"] = id_resp_h, Country, Bytes, Service

content.query:
union
(
    corelight_conn_agg
    | where '{ShowAggregation}' == "Yes"
),
(
    corelight_conn
    | where '{ShowAggregation}' == "No"
)
| where ('*' in ({Sensor}) or sensor_name in ({Sensor}))
    and (('*' == ('{id_orig_h}') or id_orig_h == ('{id_orig_h}')) )
    and (('*' == ('{id_orig_p}') or id_orig_p == ('{id_orig_p}')) )
    and (('*' == ('{id_resp_h}') or id_resp_h == ('{id_resp_h}')) )
    and (('*' == ('{id_resp_p}') or id_resp_p == ('{id_resp_p}')) )
    and ('*' == '{connection_uid}' or uid contains '{connection_uid}')
| where not(is_broadcast == "true" and local_resp == "true") 
    and isnotempty(uid)
| search '{AdditionalFilter}'
| where ('*' == ('{service}') or set_has_element(app, '{service}'))
| summarize
    duration = avg(duration),
    src_ip = make_set(id_orig_h),
    dest_ip = make_set(id_resp_h),
    dest_port = make_set(id_resp_p),
    service = make_set(app)
    by session_id = uid
| extend duration = duration / 1000.0
| sort by duration desc
| take 100
| project UID = session_id, Duration = duration, ["Source IP"] = src_ip, ["Destination IP"] = dest_ip, ["Destination Port"]=dest_port, Service = service

content.query:
let dummy_table = datatable(uid_s: string, TenantId: string, SourceSystem: string, MG: string, ManagementGroupName: string, Computer: string, RawData: string, _ResourceId: string)[];

union Corelight*, dummy_table
| where uid_s == '{open_uid}' or uids_s == '{open_uid}'
| project-away TenantId, SourceSystem, MG, ManagementGroupName, Computer, RawData, _ResourceId
content.title: Details of UID: {open_uid}

parameters.name: ResponderPort
parameters.label: Responder Port (dest_port)
parameters.query:
let DNSPorts = datatable(
        id_resp_p: real
    )[
        137,
        53,
        5353,
        5355
    ];
union DNSPorts, (union
    (corelight_dns_agg
    | where '{ShowAggregation}' == "Yes"),
    (corelight_dns
    | where '{ShowAggregation}' == "No")
| where ('*' in ({Sensor}) or sensor_name in ({Sensor})))
| where isnotempty(id_resp_p)
| distinct id_resp_p
| extend port_number = tostring(toint(id_resp_p))
| lookup _GetWatchlist('CorelightDNSPortDesc') on port_number
| summarize arg_max(LastUpdatedTimeUTC, *) by port_number
| extend label = iff(isnotempty(description),strcat(description, " (", port_number, ")"), port_number)
| project id_resp_p, label
| sort by label asc

parameters.name: RecordType
parameters.label: Record Type
parameters.query:
let DNSLookup = datatable(
        record_type: string
    )[
        "A",
        "AAAA",
        "CNAME",
        "MX",
        "NB",
        "NULL",
        "PTR",
        "SRV",
        "TXT",
        "AXFR",
        "CAA",
        "DNSKEY",
        "NS",
        "SOA",
        "query-38712"
    ];
union DNSLookup, (union
    (corelight_dns_agg
    | where '{ShowAggregation}' == "Yes"),
    (corelight_dns
    | where '{ShowAggregation}' == "No")
| where ('*' in ({Sensor}) or sensor_name in ({Sensor})))
| where isnotempty(record_type)
| distinct record_type
| sort by record_type asc

content.query:

    (corelight_dns
    | where '{ShowAggregation}' == "No")
| where ('*' in ({Sensor}) or sensor_name in ({Sensor}))
| where ('*' == ('{RecordType}') or record_type == ('{RecordType}'))
| where ('*' == ('{ResponderPort}') or id_resp_p == ('{ResponderPort}'))
| search '{AdditionalFilter}'
| where is_broadcast != "true"
| where isnotempty(query) | count

let interval_in_hrs= datetime_diff('hour', {GlobalTimeRestriction:end}, {GlobalTimeRestriction:start});

    (corelight_http_agg
    | where '{ShowAggregation}' == "Yes"),
    (corelight_http
    | where '{ShowAggregation}' == "No")
| where ('*' in ({Sensor}) or sensor_name in ({Sensor}))

| search '{AdditionalFilter}'
| make-series Sparkline = count() default = 0 on TimeGenerated from {GlobalTimeRestriction:start} to {GlobalTimeRestriction:end} step bin_duration by id_orig_h
| extend Count = array_sum(Sparkline)
| project ["Source IP"] = id_orig_h, ["Originator Over Time"] = Sparkline, Count
| top 10 by Count

content.json: Dashboard to visualize AWS VPC Flow data captured by Corelight.

parameters.name: VpcId
parameters.label: VPC ID
parameters.query:
// KQL query to populate VPC IDs
corelight_conn
| where ('*' in ({Sensor}) or sensor_name in ({Sensor}))
| where capture_source == "vpcflow" and isnotempty(capture_metadata_vpc_vpc_id)
| distinct capture_metadata_vpc_vpc_id

parameters.name: OrgId
parameters.label: AWS Organization ID
parameters.query:
// KQL query to populate AWS Org IDs
corelight_conn
| where ('*' in ({Sensor}) or sensor_name in ({Sensor}))
| where capture_source == "vpcflow" 
| where isnotempty(orig_inst_org_id) or isnotempty(resp_inst_org_id)
| extend org_id=coalesce(orig_inst_org_id, resp_inst_org_id)
| distinct org_id

content.query:
corelight_conn
| where ('*' in ({Sensor}) or sensor_name in ({Sensor}))  
| where ("*" in ({VpcId:value}) or capture_metadata_vpc_vpc_id in ({VpcId:value})) 
| where ("*" == "{OrgId}" or org_id == "{OrgId}") 
| where ("*" in ({Direction:value}) or direction in ({Direction:value}))
| where capture_source == "vpcflow" and transport != "icmp"
| summarize total_volume = sum(bytes)
| project-rename ["Total Volume"] = total_volume
content.title: Total Volume
Total Connections
Unique Source IPs
Unique Destination IPs

content.query:
corelight_conn
| where ('*' in ({Sensor}) or sensor_name in ({Sensor}))  
| where ("*" in ({VpcId:value}) or capture_metadata_vpc_vpc_id in ({VpcId:value})) 
| where ("*" == "{OrgId}" or org_id == "{OrgId}")
| where ("*" in ({Direction:value}) or direction in ({Direction:value}))
| where capture_source == "vpcflow"
| summarize enriched_count = countif(isnotempty(orig_inst_org_id) or isnotempty(resp_inst_org_id))
| extend ["Cloud Enrichment"] = iff(enriched_count > 0, "Enriched Conn Logs are Present", "Enriched Conn Logs are not Present")
| project ["Cloud Enrichment"]
content.title: Cloud Enrichment

content.query:
corelight_conn
| where ('*' in ({Sensor}) or sensor_name in ({Sensor}))  
| where ("*" in ({VpcId:value}) or capture_metadata_vpc_vpc_id in ({VpcId:value})) 
| where ("*" == "{OrgId}" or org_id == "{OrgId}") 
| where ("*" in ({Direction:value}) or direction in ({Direction:value}))

content.query:
let interval_in_hrs=datetime_diff('hour', {GlobalTimeRestriction:end}, {GlobalTimeRestriction:start});
let interval_in_days=datetime_diff('day', {GlobalTimeRestriction:end}, {GlobalTimeRestriction:start});
let bin_duration=case(interval_in_hrs<=24, 1h, interval_in_days<=30, 1d, interval_in_days>=31 and interval_in_days<=90, 7d, 31d);
corelight_conn
| where ('*' in ({Sensor}) or sensor_name in ({Sensor}))  
| where ("*" in ({VpcId:value}) or capture_metadata_vpc_vpc_id in ({VpcId:value}))
| where ("*" == "{OrgId}" or org_id == "{OrgId}")
| where isnotempty(orig_inst_id) or isnotempty(resp_inst_id)
| where capture_source == "vpcflow" and transport != "icmp"
| where direction == "inbound"
| extend security_groups = todynamic(orig_inst_sg_ids)
| mv-expand security_group = security_groups
| where isnotempty(security_group)
| make-series Trend = count() default = 0 on TimeGenerated from {GlobalTimeRestriction:start} to {GlobalTimeRestriction:end} step bin_duration by security_group = tostring(security_group), dest_port
| project
    ["AWS Security Group"] = security_group,
    ["Destination Port"] = dest_port,
    ["Connections"] = Trend
| sort by toreal(Connections) desc

content.query:
corelight_conn
| where ('*' in ({Sensor}) or sensor_name in ({Sensor}))

| summarize 
    ["First Seen"] = min(TimeGenerated),
    ["Last Seen"] = max(TimeGenerated),
    ["Total Duration"] = sum(duration) / 1000,
    ["Bytes Sent"] = sum(bytes_out),
    ["Bytes Received"] = sum(bytes_in),
    Total_Connections = count(),
    direction_set = make_set(direction),
    vpc_id_set = make_set(capture_metadata_vpc_vpc_id)

| extend 
    ["Direction"] = strcat_array(direction_set, ","),
    ["AWS VPC ID"] = strcat_array(vpc_id_set, ",")
| order by Total_Connections desc
| project 
    ["First Seen"], 
    ["Last Seen"], 
    ["AWS VPC ID"], 
    ["Source IP"] = src_ip, 
    ["Bytes Sent"], 
    ["Direction"], 
    ["Destination IP"] = dest_ip, 
    ["Destination Port"] = transport_port, 
    ["Bytes Received"], 
    ["Total Duration"], 
    ["Total Connections"] = Total_Connections

content.query:
let assets = corelight_asset_classification

    | where ('*' in ({OSName}) or os_name in ({OSName}))

    | where ('*' == '{IPAddress}' or ip == '{IPAddress}')
    | where isnotempty(os_name)

corelight_conn

| mv-expand app to typeof(string)
| where isnotempty(app)
| summarize Connections = count() by os_name, app
| top 50 by Connections desc

content.query:
corelight_asset_classification
| where TimeGenerated {GlobalTimeRestriction}
| where ('*' in ({Sensor}) or sensor_name in ({Sensor}))
| where ('*' in ({OSName}) or os_name in ({OSName}))
| where ('*' in ({TypeGroup}) or type_group in ({TypeGroup}))
| where ('*' in ({TypeName}) or type_name in ({TypeName}))
| where ('*' == '{IPAddress}' or ip == '{IPAddress}')
| summarize os_name    = make_set(os_name),
            type_name  = make_set(type_name),
            type_group = make_set(type_group)
  by ip
| extend os_name    = strcat_array(os_name,    ", "),
         type_name  = strcat_array(type_name,  ", "),
         type_group = strcat_array(type_group, ", ")
| extend os_name = coalesce(os_name, "unknown"), type_name = coalesce(type_name, "unknown"), type_group = coalesce(type_group, "unknown")
| sort by ip asc
| take 100
| project-rename IP = ip, ["OS Name"] = os_name, ["Type Name"] = type_name, ["Type Group"] = type_group

content.query:
corelight_asset_classification
| where ('*' in ({Sensor}) or sensor_name in ({Sensor}))
| where ('*' in ({OSName}) or os_name in ({OSName}))
| where ('*' in ({TypeGroup}) or type_group in ({TypeGroup}))
| where ('*' in ({TypeName}) or type_name in ({TypeName}))
| where ('*' == '{IPAddress}' or ip == '{IPAddress}')
| extend confidence = case(
    confidence >= 80, "High",
    confidence>=20 and confidence<=39, "Medium",
    confidence>=1 and confidence<=19, "Low",
    "unknown"
)
| summarize mac = make_set(mac), 
        os_name = make_set(os_name), 
        os_ver = make_set(os_ver), 
        type_name = make_set(type_name), 
        type_group = make_set(type_group), 
        brand = make_set(brand), 
        model = make_set(model), 
        sources = make_set(sources) by
        ts, ip, confidence
| extend 
    mac = coalesce(strcat_array(mac, ", "), "unknown"), 
    os_name = coalesce(strcat_array(os_name, ", "), "unknown"), 
    os_ver = coalesce(strcat_array(os_ver, ", "), "unknown"), 
    type_name = coalesce(strcat_array(type_name, ", "), "unknown"), 
    type_group = coalesce(strcat_array(type_group, ", "), "unknown"), 
    brand = coalesce(strcat_array(brand, ", "), "unknown"), 
    model = coalesce(strcat_array(model, ", "), "unknown"), 
    sources = coalesce(strcat_array(sources, ", "), "unknown")
| project
    Timestamp = ts,
    ["IP Address"] = ip,
    ["Mac Address"] = mac,
    ["OS Name"] = os_name,
    ["OS Version"] = os_ver,
    ["Type Name"] = type_name,
    ["Type Group"] = type_group,
    Brand = brand,
    Model = model,
    Confidence = confidence,
    Sources = sources
| sort by Timestamp desc
content.title: Device Inventory with Classifications
